data.title: Trader Eugene: Start going long on BERA to hedge against long-term bearishness on the overall market
data.description: Trader Eugene shared his trading records today, saying that he has started to go long on BERA to hedge against the long-term bearishness of the overall market. The logic for BEA is mainly as follows: 1. Excellent sustainable income cycle, which needs to be participated in through BERA (similar to AVAX Rush); 2. Both retail investors and institutional funds have very light positions; 3. The distribution of new coins is relatively reasonable. Eugene said: "Currently, going long on BERA is a liquid position, which I will actively manage. But I think the market is clearly underestimating its value at present, and there may be a sharp gap filling in the next few weeks."

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Rapper Eminem’s former recording engineer illegally sold 25 unreleased tracks via BTC, making around $50,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Joseph Strange, the former recording engineer of the famous American rapper Eminem, illegally sold 25 unreleased tracks of Eminem through Bitcoin, making a profit of about $50,000. He will face up to five years in prison and a fine of up to $250,000. (Crypto Briefing)

data.title: ORCA hit 2.9 USDT in the short term, up more than 60% in 24 hours
data.description: Bitget market data shows that affected by the listing on Upbit, ORCA short-term touched 2.9 USDT and was temporarily reported at 2.616 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 62%.

data.title: Eminem's Former Recording Engineer Faces Legal Consequences for Bitcoin Sales
data.description: According to Foresight News, Joseph Strange, who previously worked as a recording engineer for renowned U.S. rapper Eminem, has been accused of illegally selling 25 unreleased tracks of the artist using Bitcoin. The transactions reportedly earned him approximately $50,000. Strange, who served as Eminem's recording engineer from 2007 to 2021, now faces potential legal repercussions, including a maximum prison sentence of five years and fines up to $250,000.

data.title: Berachain Foundation: PoL will be launched on March 24, and governance will enter the first phase
data.description: The Berachain Foundation announced that PoL (Proof of Liquidity) will be officially launched on March 24, governance will enter the first phase, the incentive mechanism will take effect, and the new reward pool will be discharged. This change means that BGT holders will have more control and profit opportunities, will determine the direction of incentives, and support the allocation of incentives for users, applications, and validators.

data.title: GT's market value ranks among the top 40 cryptocurrencies, currently priced at $22.611
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that the market value of Gate.io platform currency GT has reached 2.783 billion US dollars, ranking among the top 40 cryptocurrency market value list. Currently, GT is quoted at 22.611 US dollars.

data.title: Upbit announces the launch of Orca (ORCA)
data.description: Upbit announced that it will launch Orca (ORCA) KRW, BTC, and USDT trading pairs.
